_comment: Mutation testing for the renderer (Stryker >= 9). Wave-2a, NON-BLOCKING NIGHTLY ONLY. Complements the 100% vitest line+branch gate (gate:3): coverage proves a line ran, mutation proves a test would FAIL if its logic were wrong. Scope is DELIBERATELY NARROW to the high-value PURE-LOGIC renderer libs (timeline cue algebra + the typed RPC client) — NOT React components or wiring, whose mutants are mostly equivalent. Stryker is INSTALLED AD-HOC by .github/workflows/mutation.yml (npm install --no-save) and is NOT in package.json devDependencies, so it never enters package-lock.json and cannot affect the blocking gates (npm ci / osv-scanner). Run locally from app/ with: npx stryker run. The mutation-score TARGET lives in the repo-root .coverage-thresholds.json (key: mutation.renderer).
_comment_thresholds: break is null so a low score NEVER fails the run — Wave-2a is observe-only / non-blocking. The documented target (see .coverage-thresholds.json) is enforced by review, not by failing CI.
